name: Cucumber Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cucumber in half horizontally.
2. Peel, seed and shred half of the cucumber.
3. Measure 1/3 cup shredded cucumber. Slice remaining cucumber for garnish.
4. Cut slices in half; set aside.
5. Combine cream cheese, mayonnaise and seasoned salt, mixing until blended.
6. Stir in shredded cucumber.
7. Spread each bread round with 1 teaspoon cucumber spread.
8. Garnish each sandwich with a thin slice of cucumber and a sprig of parsley.
9. Makes 48 sandwiches.
